title: Crownless Watch Sealed Case

imagePrompts.prompt:
PHASE 1 — FORM: A premium editorial style with a perfectly smooth sealed case — no crown, no buttons, no openings

PHASE 2 — DIAL: deep teal dial, brushed aluminum finish, hour markers only — no text

PHASE 3 — STRAP: matte ceramic in deep teal, AURORA surface

PHASE 4 — SETTING: KINETIC, soft golden side light, cinematic documentary style editorial

Swap: premium editorial style / tomato red / matte ceramic / setting
